flags_for_research_team.signal: Fear & Greed Index recovering from 22 (last month) to 27 (current)
flags_for_research_team.implication: Sentiment bottoming pattern - often leads price by 1-2 weeks
flags_for_research_team.historical_context: Similar recoveries from 22-25 range preceded 15-20% relief rallies in 2024-2025
flags_for_research_team.action_required: Monitor daily Fear & Greed readings. Alert if crosses above 30.

flags_for_research_team.signal: ETH -1.87% vs BTC -0.29% today; ETH/BTC ratio under pressure
flags_for_research_team.implication: Risk-off behavior - alts leading weakness, institutional preference for BTC
flags_for_research_team.historical_context: ETH/BTC ratio declines often mark late-cycle risk-off before major corrections
flags_for_research_team.action_required: Monitor ETH/BTC ratio. Consider reducing ETH allocation temporarily.
